author: gthgomez
name: Local Ablation Pipeline: GTX 1650 — EMA + Int6 + Partial RoPE + LN Scale + Weight Decay
blurb: Dev-hardware (GTX 1650, 4 GB VRAM, SM 7.5) local ablation pipeline porting proven techniques from leaderboard entries #1 and #2. All features validated via 200-step medium-scale runs: EMA (decay sweep 0.97/0.997), int6 clip-search quantizer, partial RoPE (ROPE_DIMS=16), LN scale (1/sqrt(layer+1)), Muon/Adam decoupled weight decay, and MLP_MULT float support. Not a competition-scale submission — intended to validate code paths and stage the feature set for a future 8x H100 run.
hardware: NVIDIA GTX 1650 (4 GB VRAM, SM 7.5, no FlashAttention, no torch.compile on Windows)
note: 200-step local ablation run, seq_len=512, batch=4096 tokens. NOT competition-scale. val_bpb reflects EMA+int8 roundtrip on a 17M-param 9L model. Full competition config (11L, MLP_MULT=3.0, seq_len=2048, 7000+ steps) requires 8xH100.
features: NO_COMPILE / math SDP fallback for SM<8.0 (GTX compatibility patch)
MAX_VAL_SEQS cap for fast local validation
EMA (EMA_DECAY env var, default off, competition value 0.997)
int6 clip-search quantizer (5-percentile search per row, values in [-31,31])
int6 A/B comparison at export time
LN Scale 1/sqrt(layer+1) on attn+mlp norms (LN_SCALE env var)
Muon decoupled weight decay (MUON_WD env var)
AdamW for tok/scalar optimizers (ADAM_WD env var)
